name: QA 1131
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1131

Exercise pcp2json and pcp2openmetrics.



Copyright (c) 2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream10-container reproduce
